title: Query planner fault on three-way nested join with compound inner SELECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO t3 (id, value, description) VALUES (1, 3.14, 'pi');
INSERT INTO t3 (id, value, description) VALUES (2, NULL, 'null value');
SELECT id, description FROM (SELECT id, value FROM t3 WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM (SELECT * FROM t3 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE id = 1) ORDER BY id);
key_bug_features: SELECT statement causes assertion fault or out of range error
